column1: # GSV coverage regime per country (hand-maintained; edit as coverage changes).
#  - "absent"/"sparse" countries are force-included so the cross-provider
#    (GSV-vs-Mapillary) coverage gap is represented in the frame.
#  - every selected city is tagged with its country's regime in the manifest.
# regime is one of: present | sparse | absent
#  - present : normal official Google Street View car coverage (the default for
#  - sparse  : official coverage exists but is limited
#  - absent  : effectively no official Street View car coverage.
